overview: DantaNova is an AI-powered dental health platform offering tooth scanning, 3D visualization, Dental Passport, emergency dentist connection, and a suite of free tools including health dashboards, risk quizzes, brushing timers, blog articles, referral system, PWA install, and geolocation-based dentist search — all with a premium gold Tony Stark HUD design.
features: AI-powered dental scan (simulated) with 5-step camera wizard
3D interactive dental arch visualization with glass-enamel textures
Patient health dashboard with scan trend charts
Geolocation-based nearest dentist search
Dental Passport system — create, issue, lookup, and reimbursement
Emergency dentist booking with real-time messaging
Blog with dental health articles for SEO
Risk assessment quiz with instant health risk score
2-minute tooth brushing timer with quadrant guide
Before/after scan comparison page
Daily dental health tips rotating carousel
PWA manifest — installable as home screen app
Referral invite system with tracking
Social sharing buttons for WhatsApp and Twitter
Scroll-to-top, toast notifications, empty states, onboarding walkthrough
Y Combinator pitch page, pricing tiers, corporate plan
3 analytics dashboards (Marketing, Operations, Support)
SEO: schema.org, sitemap, IndexNow, AdSense, FAQPage, Blog schema
Gold Tony Stark HUD hero with scan-line animation and neural network
Changelog, HTML sitemap, search page, and accessibility improvements
